duplicate_systems_both_active.note: Both Dawn and Invicta predictive search systems are loaded simultaneously. predictive-search.js is loaded conditionally (settings.predictive_search_enabled) from theme.liquid. invicta-predictive-search.js is loaded via snippets/predictive-search-inline.liquid. Neither is dead — this is an optimisation opportunity, not a removal candidate.

duplicate_css_loading: component-cart.css, component-totals.css, component-price.css, component-discounts.css are loaded BOTH globally in theme.liquid AND by individual cart sections. Not dead, but could be deduplicated.
